overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a long coat and hat exploring a rural livestock auction yard. The character walks through muddy grounds past wooden barns, sheep pens, and farm equipment under an overcast sky, eventually exiting through a wooden archway into open countryside.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered wooden walkway alongside a sheep pen. The character walks forward, exiting the sheltered area into an open muddy yard. White sheep are visible grazing in the fenced enclosure to the left as the camera turns slightly right around the fence corner.

segments.scene_description: Walking through the open yard, the character passes a weathered wooden shed with stacked hay bales on the left. A large livestock barn with painted signage becomes visible on the right. The two-story ranch house recedes into the left background as the character moves deeper into the facility.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the central yard where chickens scatter from the path. A broken wagon sits to the right while the main livestock barn with category signage looms ahead. A wooden archway gate is visible in the distance, marking the entrance to the facility.

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the wooden archway gate, exiting the livestock facility into the open countryside. Mountains rise in the distant background while the fenced pens and barns of the auction yard fall behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a muddy livestock auction yard that gradually opens into a wide mountain landscape. It begins under a covered wooden walkway beside a sheep pen, moving forward into an open yard where the camera turns past a weathered shed and stacked hay bales. As the character progresses deeper into the facility, the scene shifts past scattering chickens and a broken wagon toward a large livestock barn with painted signage. The path then narrows into a corridor between fenced pens filled with grazing sheep, leading the camera directly toward a distant wooden archway. Finally, the character passes through the gate, leaving the barns and fences behind as the view expands to reveal the open countryside and rising mountains in the distance.
